body.title: Engram tool: verify deposited engram surfaces for target queries
body.result: verify() wrapping cortex.search per target query, with rank + top-k checks. all_pass() helper. 22 tests covering happy path, input validation, result shape tolerance (Memory/dict/string). fc2a2895.
body.description:
Build CC-side verification tool: given an engram ID + list of target queries, runs cortex search for each query and reports whether engram surfaces in top-K. Returns per-query pass/fail + rank. Used after T-deposit-grounding-engram to confirm the engram is retrievable.

**Affected files:** new lab/claudecode/engram_tools/verify_retrieval.py, tests/test_verify_retrieval.py
**Design rules:** docs-in-code, test-plan-or-why-not
**Scope boundary:** IN — verification wrapper over existing cortex search; pass/fail report. OUT — tuning retrieval weights, auto-promotion on failure.
**Test plan:** unit tests: deposit known engram, verify surfaces for target queries at top-3; verify unrelated engram does not surface for same queries.
